meaning: vt.再派遣,再差遣,再发,再寄
examples: If there are any missing messages, the RMS will resend those.
Suppose a response goes missing. The server wants to resend that message to the client.
In fact, not only you can observe the requests passively, but you can also modify and resend them.
They started calling us and asking for us to resend it to them.
